query:
-- Update the password hash for the driver user
UPDATE users 
SET password_hash = '$2b$10$PSvPoHZM68uTN08mF9IA8.z76OFnJgbfZkoATdPV3NyPw.o0R2Fsa'
WHERE email = 'fergusgosson@gmail.com';

-- Get the user ID
SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'fergusgosson@gmail.com';

-- Create driver profile (assuming user_id is the result from above)
INSERT INTO drivers (user_id, vehicle_type, vehicle_number, license_number, is_online, is_available, created_at, updated_at)
SELECT id, 'Car', '09d1956', NULL, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW()
FROM users 
WHERE email = 'fergusgosson@gmail.com';
